name: plugin-manager
description: Descubre y gestiona plugins JSON con funciones ejecutables. Plugins viven en <pluginsPath>/<plugin-name>/<plugin-name>.functions.json. Expone par request/response via bus + 5 endpoints HTTP.
author: Event Core Team

publishes.description: Plugin cargado correctamente desde fs. Payload: { name, definition, version, description, functions, function_count, timestamp, correlation_id }.
Plugin removido (en onUnload). Payload: { name, timestamp, correlation_id }.
Error de discovery o load. Payload: { error, context: 'discovery'|'load', file?, timestamp, correlation_id }.
Reload completo. Payload: { count, loaded, errors, timestamp, correlation_id }.
Response a plugin.get.request correlacionada por request_id. Payload: { request_id, success, plugin? | error?, error_code?, timestamp, correlation_id }.
Response a plugin.list.request correlacionada por request_id. Payload: { request_id, success, plugins, count, timestamp, correlation_id }.

subscribes.description: Get plugin definition by name. Publica plugin.get.response.
List all loaded plugins. Publica plugin.list.response.

apis.description: Get specific plugin definition (404 si no existe).
List all loaded plugins con summary.
Reload all plugins from disk. Publica plugin.reloaded.
